title: NoSignGui
description: A Mod That Disables The Sign Gui , Very Usefull For Trappers
body:
# NoSignGUiMod

![Available for Fabric](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)
![Requires Fabric API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)

**NoSignGUiMod** is a simple client-side Fabric mod that disables the sign editing GUI (`SignEditScreen`) when placing signs in Minecraft. It’s useful for players who want to place signs quickly without the GUI interruption.

---

## Features

- Toggle the sign GUI on or off at any time  
- Default keybind: **V**  
- Command support: `/nosigngui`  
- Works entirely client-side; no server modification required

---

## Compatibility

- Fabric Loader (compatible with Minecraft 1.21.5)  
- Works alongside most other mods and modpacks  
- Has no effect on other players or servers

---
